name: Butterrum Pound Cake with Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Tastes richer if real butter is used, but can use solid margarine if desired (not diet or soft margarine).
2. Add vanilla flavoring instead of rum if preferred.
3. Purchase a pound cake or prepare from mix following package directions.
4. Combine butter, brown sugar, and milk in a saucepan. Bring to a full boil and add confectioners sugar and rum or vanilla flavoring.
5. Beat mixture until smooth with a whisk. Add a bit more milk if needed to make a fairly thin sauce that will pour easily onto the cake.
6. Punch holes in cake with fork tines. Pour the warm sauce slowly over cake.
